ordered_tdd_result.red_reason: ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for the web liveness route before the T053 implementation existed
intermediate_failures: standalone JSX runtime initially lacked explicit React imports
one navigation assertion initially matched the approved product name instead of only links
first production build rejected NodeNext .js source specifiers under Turbopack
ordered_tdd_result.green_result: 5 web shell tests passed and the Next.js production build completed

acceptance_evidence.session_states: pass: loading, unauthenticated, authenticated, and sanitized error states are explicit
acceptance_evidence.active_context: pass: authenticated state shows named tenant and environment context
acceptance_evidence.capability_projection: pass: only validated supplied capabilities render; visibility is explicitly not authorization
acceptance_evidence.accessibility: pass: skip link, landmarks, named navigation/context, live status, focus visibility, responsive layout, and reduced-motion support
acceptance_evidence.localization: pass: English and Spanish content use typed message keys
acceptance_evidence.health: pass: HCP-04-approved web liveness route emits the closed Health shape with no-store
